name: Master Flank Steak Stir Fry Slaw & Filling
recipeIngredient: 1 small red onion, cut into thin slivers
1/4 pound fresh shiitake mushrooms, very thinly sliced
1 small head napa cabbage, shredded (3 to 4 cups)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat 2 teaspoons oil in a large skillet (preferably nonstick).
2. Add onion slivers and sauté over medium-high heat until soft, about 5 minutes.
3. Increase heat to high and add garlic, scallions, and carrots. Stir quickly.
- If your pan is not large enough, do this in batches.
4. Add daikon, 1/2 cup chicken broth, and mushrooms. Cook, stirring, until the mixture is nearly dry, 5 to 10 minutes.
5. Transfer the mixture to a bowl.
6. Keeping the pan over high heat, add the remaining teaspoon of oil and heat almost to smoking point.
7. Add cabbage and quickly stir-fry until softened.
8. Add the reserved cooked vegetables, the remaining 1/2 cup chicken broth, and barbecue sauce. Season to taste with salt and pepper.
9. Cook until heated through. Set aside 2 cups of the mixture for roulade filling.
Serve the remainder with Grilled Flank Steak. To reheat, stir-fry over high heat just until warmed through.
Yields 4 1/2 cups.
PER 1/2-CUP SERVING: 70 calories, 2 g protein, 13 g carbohydrate, 2 g fat (0 g saturated), 0 mg cholesterol, 92 mg sodium, 3 g fiber.
First Night:
Grilled Flank Steak
For convenience, grill all the meat at the same time: the Roulade, the butterflied steak for the Citrus Salad and, of course, the steak for tonight.
1 marinated flank steak (about 1 3/4 pounds)
Salt and pepper
1. Start heating the grill 30 minutes before removing the meat from the barbecue sauce.
2. Season the steak with salt and pepper and grill to desired doneness. Remove to a cutting board, cover, and let rest 10 minutes before serving.
To serve, slice the steak against the grain into 1/4-inch thick slices; serve with Stir-Fried Napa Cabbage Slaw. Serves 4.
PER SERVING: 360 calories, 37 g protein, 7 g carbohydrate, 22 g fat (9 g saturated), 103 mg cholesterol, 122 mg sodium, 0 g fiber.
